llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: GDB/DG - DevOps Engineer (M/F/D)
job.description: DevOps Engineer OrgCode: GDB/DG Product Team: Click or tap here to enter text. Responsibilities: We are looking for a DevOps Engineer with deep expertise in CI/CD automation, end‑to‑end workflow ownership, and GitHub Actions. You will design, standardize, and operate automated delivery pipelines that enable development teams to ship high‑quality software rapidly and reliably. The role requires strong ownership of workflows, proactive improvement of DevOps processes, and close collaboration with developers, architects, and product teams. Qualifications: CI/CD Automation, Workflow Ownership, GitHub Actions Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field. Minimum of 3 years of experience as a DevOps Engineer. Experience in software development methodologies such as Kanban or Scrum. Experience in working with cross-functional teams. What we offer: Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work environment where your ideas are valued, and your curiosity and ambition are encouraged. Benefit from flexible working models, international networking, and a strong sense of purpose as we enable our customers’ green transformation and lead the way in digital excellence. [to include specific local benefits].
